problem id: 7fec1d14
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  11111001 -> 01110011
  11111011 -> 11100011
  10010100 -> 01011011
  01011100 -> 00011101
  01111110 -> 10001101
  10011100 -> 00011011
  10011011 -> 11100011
  11000101 -> 10010011

query: 10101010
predicted answer: 00101010
